rows.objective: Fallback JSON export is active and operational; native n8n Data Table writes blocked by SQLITE_FULL (n8n instance disk at capacity). Fallback mode successfully persists task state to `bolt.work/n8n/open-tasks-table.json`. Restoring direct API writes requires freeing n8n disk space. Current release cycle acceptable with fallback; deferring native writes to post-cleanup cycle.
